nodes.name: Cron 21:00 KL
nodes.notes: Daily at 21:00 Asia/Kuala_Lumpur. Dinner deliveries done by 19:00, so all of today's orders are settled by 21:00.

nodes.name: Fetch Daily Recap
nodes.notes: Reuses the same N8N API Key Header Auth credential. IMPORTANT: hit www.incredibowl.my (not incredibowl.my).

nodes.name: Build Telegram Message
nodes.notes: Composes the boss recap message. Edit format here — no template approval, changes live next day.

nodes.name: Send Telegram Message
nodes.notes: Reuses the same Telegram Bot credential as daily-prep. chatId is boss's personal chat with the bot.
